project_title: Adds Signature Room Architecture (7 zones) + UI/UX Spec (9 objects, 7 engines)
product_name: Adds Signature Room Architecture (7 zones) + UI/UX Spec (9 objects, 7 engines)
runtime_target: local-first web application or desktop module with persistent project state
operational_end_state: A researcher can enter a project, use named instruments, observe state changes, and export a governed work product.
minimum_operational_release: A runnable slice of Adds Signature Room Architecture (7 zones) + UI/UX Spec (9 objects, 7 engines): one complete workflow from input to output, with fixture, state record, export, acceptance test, and source-bound claim boundary.
full_build_definition: A runnable local or web application with a defined user flow, input fixture, persisted or exportable output, source-bound mechanism, acceptance tests, and a reviewer-visible claim ceiling.
source_actions_before_claim: Complete 2 close-read contract(s), update 6 linked proof-capsule field(s), and preserve the current claim ceiling until passage notes exist.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
public_claim_now: May claim a prototype-to-full-build path exists; do not claim completed operational system.
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
blocking_gates: passage-level close-read notes | captured runnable workflow
first_full_build: Add promotion-router examples showing how a packet becomes a room, paper, software instrument, source reservoir, archive item, or blocked record.
launch_or_review_path: Create or open the local runtime slice for `mb-muranoos-red-team-handoff-hardened-2026-04-15`, then execute the fixture-to-output workflow and capture the result.

instruments.purpose: Turn the `state model` module into a concrete input-operation-output step for Adds Signature Room Architecture (7 zones) + UI/UX Spec (9 objects, 7 engines).
instruments.input_contract: Project fixture, source duty, current claim boundary, and required output state.
instruments.operation: Execute or inspect the state model step against the project fixture and record the state change it is supposed to produce.
instruments.output_contract: A reviewer-visible state record, output artifact, or decision boundary tied to the project acceptance tests.
instruments.acceptance_condition: The state model instrument is present, named, connected to the fixture, and has an output or decision field that can be reviewed.

acceptance_tests: claim ceiling test: public claims cannot exceed built evidence
source test: metadata-routed sources require close reading before citation or quotation
privacy test: no local paths or private directories in public deploy
state-transition test: visible input changes recorded state and output
